design_philosophy: Dense multi-column upload with keyboard-first inline-edit on the validation-error grid; built for the daily high-volume Importer.
strengths: All 14 validation errors visible on one screen, no scrolling
Fix errors inline without leaving the table
weaknesses: Eight-column error grid is intimidating for first-time users
Hidden shortcuts must be learned before they pay off
Dense form layout leaves little room for help text
tradeoffs: Faster for daily importers; harder to absorb on first contact.
use_when: Daily importers who handle many batches and want to fix errors inline at speed.
